text: In this environment, I am enveloped by quiet anticipation; the glass-walled room beckons with an almost clinical openness, while the R+D exhibit draws my mind deeply into reflection. I feel small amid systems of knowledge and innovation—keenly aware of the tension between sterile modernity and the vibrant search for human meaning. There is something both isolating and unifying about standing where ideas and technology converge, inviting me to interrogate my own existence amid these symbols of progress.
